# Quickstart: E-Commerce Store MVP

**Branch**: `001-e-commerce-store` | **Date**: 2026-04-03
**Generated by**: `/speckit.plan` (Phase 1)

---

## Prerequisites

| Tool | Version | Install |
|------|---------|---------|
| Node.js | 20.x LTS | https://nodejs.org |
| pnpm | 9.x | `npm i -g pnpm` |
| Supabase account | any | https://supabase.com |
| Cloudinary account | any | https://cloudinary.com |

---

## 1. Clone / Initialise the project

> **Note on Next.js version**: This spec targets `next@16.2.0`. As of April 2026, this version may be a pre-release or canary build. If `pnpm create next-app@16.2.0` fails, use `pnpm create next-app@latest` and pin the resulting version in `package.json`. The spec is compatible with Next.js 15.x App Router with minor adjustments.

```bash
# From the workspace root — Next.js is not yet scaffolded
pnpm create next-app@16.2.0 . \
  --typescript \
  --tailwind \
  --eslint \
  --app \
  --src-dir=false \
  --import-alias="@/*"
```

---

## 2. Install dependencies (exact pinned versions)

```bash
pnpm add \
  @prisma/client@5.22.0 \
  zustand@4.5.5 \
  lucide-react@0.468.0 \
  jose@5.9.6 \
  bcryptjs@2.4.3 \
  swiper@11.1.3 \
  zod@3.23.8

pnpm add -D \
  prisma@5.22.0 \
  typescript@5.7.3 \
  @types/node@22.15.3 \
  @types/react@18.3.1 \
  @types/react-dom@18.3.1 \
  @types/bcryptjs@2.4.6
```

> All versions must be pinned in `package.json` — no `^` or `~` prefixes.

**Required `package.json` scripts** (verify these exist after scaffolding):

```json
{
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev",
    "build": "next build",
    "start": "next start",
    "lint": "next lint",
    "postinstall": "prisma generate"
  }
}
```

> `postinstall` is critical — without it, Vercel deploys fail with
> `PrismaClientInitializationError` because `@prisma/client` is generated at
> install time, not at build time.

---

## 3. Configure environment variables

Copy `.env.example` to `.env.local` and fill in values:

```bash
cp .env.example .env.local
```

`.env.local` required keys:

```env
# Supabase — both URLs required (pooled for runtime, direct for migrations)
DATABASE_URL="postgresql://postgres.[project-ref]:[password]@aws-0-eu-central-1.pooler.supabase.com:6543/postgres?pgbouncer=true"
DIRECT_URL="postgresql://postgres.[project-ref]:[password]@aws-0-eu-central-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres"

# Auth
JWT_SECRET="your-32-plus-char-random-secret"

# Admin bootstrapping (first login only)
ADMIN_PHONE="01012345678"
ADMIN_PASSWORD="your-admin-password"

# Vercel Cron (automatically injected by Vercel in production)
CRON_SECRET="your-cron-secret"

# Canonical URL for Next.js Metadata API (og:url, canonical links)
NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL="https://your-store.vercel.app"

# Cloudinary (public — safe to expose)
NEXT_PUBLIC_CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME="your-cloud-name"
NEXT_PUBLIC_CLOUDINARY_UPLOAD_PRESET="your-unsigned-preset"
```

> **WhatsApp number**: The store WhatsApp number is configured from **Dashboard Settings** (not an env var). After first login, go to `/dashboard/settings` and set the WhatsApp number to enable the "أرسل عبر واتساب" order button.

---

## 4. Configure Prisma

```bash
pnpm prisma init
```

Replace `prisma/schema.prisma` with the schema from
`specs/02-database-schema.md`.

Verify `datasource db` block:
```prisma
datasource db {
  provider  = "postgresql"
  url       = env("DATABASE_URL")
  directUrl = env("DIRECT_URL")
}
```

---

## 5. Run the first migration

> **Shortcut**: `prisma/migrate-and-rls.sh` runs steps 5 **and** 6 in one command (migrate + RLS apply). Requires `DIRECT_URL` to be set. Run with:
> ```bash
> bash prisma/migrate-and-rls.sh
> ```
> The script: (1) runs `prisma migrate deploy` using `DIRECT_URL`, (2) applies `prisma/rls.sql` via `psql`. Prefer this script in CI and fresh-DB setups over running the steps manually.

Or run each step manually:

```bash
pnpm prisma migrate dev --name init
```

> Uses `DIRECT_URL` (direct connection) for the migration, then `DATABASE_URL`
> (pooled) for all runtime queries.

Verify tables were created:
```bash
pnpm prisma studio
```

---

## 6. Run Row Level Security (RLS)

After the migration, apply RLS to all sensitive tables. This is a **one-time
manual step** (not a Prisma migration) that must run on every Supabase
environment (dev + production).

```bash
# Open the Supabase SQL Editor and run prisma/rls.sql, OR:
psql "$DIRECT_URL" -f prisma/rls.sql
```

Verify RLS is active:

```sql
SELECT tablename, rowsecurity
FROM pg_tables
WHERE schemaname = 'public'
ORDER BY tablename;
-- Every sensitive table must show: rowsecurity = true
```

---

## 7. Configure `next.config.ts`

```ts
import type { NextConfig } from "next";

const nextConfig: NextConfig = {
  images: {
    remotePatterns: [
      {
        protocol: "https",
        hostname: "res.cloudinary.com",
        pathname: "/**",
      },
    ],
  },
};

export default nextConfig;
```

---

## 8. Configure `vercel.json` (Cron Job)

```json
{
  "crons": [
    {
      "path": "/api/cron/abandoned-cart",
      "schedule": "0 * * * *"
    }
  ]
}
```

---

## 9. Run the development server

```bash
pnpm dev
```

Open http://localhost:3000.

---

## 10. Verify the performance setup

| Check | How to verify |
|-------|---------------|
| Server Components default | Open browser DevTools → Network; confirm no client JS for `/products` page components |
| Streaming + Suspense | Throttle to Slow 3G in DevTools; confirm filter bar and header paint before product grid |
| `next/image` | Inspect product image elements; confirm WebP served and `loading="lazy"` on card images; `fetchpriority="high"` on hero |
| Metadata API | `View Page Source` on any product page; confirm `<title>` contains product name |

---

## 11. Deploy to Vercel

```bash
# Install Vercel CLI
pnpm add -g vercel

# Link project and deploy
vercel --prod
```

Add all `.env.local` variables to Vercel Environment Variables.
Verify Cron Job appears in Vercel Dashboard → Deployments → Cron Jobs.

---

## Troubleshooting

| Problem | Solution |
|---------|----------|
| `JWT_SECRET` generation | Run `openssl rand -base64 32` and paste the result into Vercel env vars |
| RLS not applied in production | Run `psql "$DIRECT_URL" -f prisma/rls.sql` against the production Supabase project |
| `P1001: Can't reach database` in dev | Check `DIRECT_URL` in `.env.local`; try disabling VPN |
| `PrismaClientInitializationError` on Vercel | Add `postinstall: "prisma generate"` to `package.json` scripts |
| `next/image` domain error | Add `res.cloudinary.com` to `images.remotePatterns` in `next.config.ts` |
| Cron not firing locally | Test manually: `curl -H "Authorization: Bearer $CRON_SECRET" http://localhost:3000/api/cron/abandoned-cart` |
| Admin redirected to `/login` repeatedly | Check `JWT_SECRET` env var is set and matches between signing and verifying |
